title: Taeros
description: Vastly improves performance, graphics, and the End Dimension!
body:
Improves graphics, performance, and the End Dimension!

Taeros is a Minecraft mod meant to keep the feel of Vanilla Minecraft while adding content in areas where it lacks.
Content additions include the Better End Mod, Geophilic, and Repurposed Structures.
Taeros also includes several performance enhancing mods such as Sodium, Ferrite Core, and Starlight, among other mods.
Several bug fixes and quality of life mods (such as AppleSkin) are also part of the modpack.
Altogether, these mods make Minecraft run faster, and make exploration a bit more interesting in traditionally barren areas.

The modpack comes with Complementary Shaders to make the game look and feel modern, and to make the experience more immersive.
